content: Kaplay physics: body() makes objects solid+gravity-affected; static platforms use body({isStatic:true}); setGravity(n) global. vel in px/sec. One-way platforms via platformEffector(). Collision events onCollide/onCollideUpdate/onCollideEnd. Caveat: impulses/forces applied at center of mass, no torque; collision module is still maturing. Generic platformer wisdom: resolve X then Y axis separately to avoid sticking on tile seams/corners; combine adjacent floor tiles into one collider to avoid seam catches. Fast objects can tunnel through thin colliders.
